Container.Name: nulltracer-renderer
Container.Overview:
GPU-accelerated ray tracing through curved spacetimes — server-side renderer. Provides a FastAPI endpoint that renders black hole visualizations using CUDA compute kernels, enabling mobile devices to offload heavy GPU work.
Pair with your existing Caddy reverse proxy to serve the full application. See the Caddyfile in the nulltracer directory for the configuration snippet.
SETUP: 1. Build the image first: docker build -t nulltracer-renderer /mnt/user/scripts/nulltracer/server/ 2. Add this container via the Unraid Docker tab. 3. Add the nulltracer site block to your existing Caddy configuration. 4. Mount /mnt/user/scripts/nulltracer as /srv/nulltracer in your Caddy container.
Container.Requires: NVIDIA GPU with driver support. NVIDIA Container Toolkit (nvidia-docker2) installed on Unraid. Build the image first: docker build -t nulltracer-renderer /mnt/user/scripts/nulltracer/server/

Config.Name: Web API Port
Config.Description: FastAPI server port for /render and /health endpoints

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: Which NVIDIA GPUs to expose (use 'all' or a specific GPU UUID)

Config.Name: NVIDIA Driver Capabilities
Config.Description: NVIDIA driver capabilities needed for CUDA compute
